title: A7MD's 3D Potions
body:
# **🧪 3D Potions Resource Pack 🧪**

Bring your Minecraft potions to life with fully detailed 3D models! This resource pack enhances all in-game potions by giving them unique, three-dimensional designs, making them more immersive and visually stunning.


---
## _**✨ Features:**_
✔️ Custom 3D Potion Bottles – Each potion type has a distinct, high-quality 3D model.

✔️ Enhanced Bottle Shapes & Corks – More realistic potion flasks for an immersive brewing experience.

✔️ Works with All Potion Types – Splash, Lingering, and Regular potions are full redesigned.

✔️ Seamless Compatibility – Works with vanilla Minecraft or other resource packs!



---
## _**🎮 How to Install:**_

Download the pack (.zip file).

Move it to your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.

---
## **Enjoy beautifully designed 3D potions!**
## Transform your alchemy with stunning 3D potion bottles—perfect for 

- **survival**
- **PVP**
- **RPG**


Enjoy your new Potions!
---
